items.content_html: The LLM plugin gives Obsidian users access to local and web-based, large language models via several chat interfaces: modal, widget, FAB window, and commands.
items.title: r-mahoney/Obsidian-LLM-Plugin: The LLM plugin gives Obsidian users access to local and web-based, large language models via several chat interfaces: modal, widget, FAB window, and commands.

items.content_html: Everything about note management. All in Zotero.
items.title: windingwind/zotero-better-notes: Everything about note management. All in Zotero.

items.content_html: EnhancedCodeblockDiff is an Obsidian plugin that enables simultaneous diff display and syntax highlighting within code blocks. With this plugin, you can visually identify code changes while preserving language-specific syntax coloring, making code comparison and review more efficient.
items.title: Syu-fu/obsidian-enhanced-codeblock-diff: EnhancedCodeblockDiff is an Obsidian plugin that enables simultaneous diff display and syntax highlighting within code blocks. With this plugin, you can visually identify code changes while preserving language-specific syntax coloring, making code comparison and review more efficient.

items.title: chrisgurney/obsidian-note-toolbar: Plugin for Obsidian providing a flexible way to create context-aware toolbars for your notes.

items.content_html: Weaver is a useful Obsidian plugin that integrates ChatGPT/GPT-3 into your note-taking workflow. This plugin makes it easy to access AI-generated suggestions and insights within Obsidian, helping you improve your writing and brainstorming process.
items.title: vasilecampeanu/obsidian-weaver: Weaver is a useful Obsidian plugin that integrates ChatGPT/GPT-3 into your note-taking workflow. This plugin makes it easy to access AI-generated suggestions and insights within Obsidian, helping you improve your writing and brainstorming process.

items.content_html: The Obsidian plugin for checking grammar and correcting spelling errors in text.
items.title: denisoed/obsidian-orthography: The Obsidian plugin for checking grammar and correcting spelling errors in text.

items.content_html: Review your daily notes on their anniversaries, like "what happened today last year"
items.title: Kageetai/obsidian-plugin-journal-review: Review your daily notes on their anniversaries, like "what happened today last year"

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that displays open tabs vertically, allowing users to group and organize tabs for a better navigation experience.

items.content_html: Obsidian Plugin for social-scientific Qualitative Data Analysis (QDA). An open alternative to MAXQDA and atlas.ti, using Markdown to store data and research codes.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian that automatically collapses all child folders when you collapse a parent folder. This helps keep your file explorer organized and clutter-free.
items.title: DarioCasciato/obsidian-auto-folder-collapse: A plugin for Obsidian that automatically collapses all child folders when you collapse a parent folder. This helps keep your file explorer organized and clutter-free.
